allow: Bash(xcodebuild -project Routinely.xcodeproj -scheme Routinely -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 16' build 2>&1 | tail -50)
Bash(xcodebuild -project Routinely.xcodeproj -scheme Routinely -sdk iphonesimulator build 2>&1 | tail -100)
Bash(xcodebuild -project Routinely.xcodeproj -scheme Routinely -sdk iphonesimulator build 2>&1 | grep -A 5 "error:")
Bash(xcodebuild -project Routinely.xcodeproj -scheme Routinely -sdk iphonesimulator build 2>&1 | grep -E "\(error:|warning:|BUILD\)" | tail -20)
Bash(xcodebuild -project Routinely.xcodeproj -scheme Routinely -sdk iphonesimulator build 2>&1 | grep -E "\(error:|warning:|BUILD\)")
Bash(xcodebuild -project Routinely.xcodeproj -scheme Routinely -sdk iphonesimulator build 2>&1 | tail -20)
Bash(xcodebuild -project Routinely.xcodeproj -scheme Routinely -sdk iphonesimulator build 2>&1 | tail -30)
